attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.MESSAGE_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.CYCLE_COUNT_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.ORGANIZATION_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.ORDER_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.SHIP_SET_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.SLC_SITE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.REQUESTED_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.AGE_BUCKET, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.PERCENT_EVALUATION, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.SELECTED_ORDER_SHIPSET, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.MESSAGE_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.HANDLING_UNIT_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.RANDOM_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.PART_DUNS_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.CISCO_DUNS_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.RETRY_COUNT, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE,
(
 select MESSAGE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE
 minus
 select MESSAGE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.MESSAGE_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.MESSAGE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE)
